hero-title: Just a handful of little agents we made for you
A few little agents we made for you
hero-lede: We don't have a big shop full of things. We just made a few small things, to help AI feel friendlier and more useful for you. Here, in plain words, is what each one actually does for you.
We don't have a big catalogue — just a few small things we built to make AI feel friendlier and more useful for you. Here's what each one really does for you, in plain words.
We don't have a big catalogue — just a few small things we built to make AI feel friendlier and more useful. Here's what each one actually does for you, in plain words.
No big catalogue — just a few small things that make AI friendlier and more useful. Here's what each one does, plainly.
A few small things that make AI friendlier. What each does:
chatyman-what: A friendly AI agent you can add to your own website.
A friendly AI agent you can add to your own website.
A friendly AI agent you can pop onto your own website.
A friendly AI agent for your own website.
An AI agent for your website.
chatyman-desc: Do you have a website? chatyman is a small chat bubble that sits in the corner of it. When a visitor has a question, chatyman answers — kindly, and in your words. It reads your own pages first, so it talks about your place, not the whole internet.

Have a website? chatyman is a little chat bubble in the corner that answers your visitors' questions — kindly, and in your own words. It reads your own pages, so it talks about your place, not the whole internet.

Got a website? chatyman is a little chat bubble in the corner that answers your visitors' questions — kindly, and in your words. It reads your own pages, so it talks about your place, not the whole internet.
A corner chat bubble for your site that answers visitors' questions in your words. It reads your pages, so it speaks about your place, not the whole internet.
A chat bubble that answers visitors from your pages, in your voice.
advisor-what: A free little guide you can play with, that shows you what an AI agent is — and how you'd build one yourself.
A free, playable guide to what an AI agent is — and how you can build one.
A free, playable guide to what an AI agent is — and how to build one.
A free, playable guide to what an agent is — and how to build one.
A free playable guide to AI agents.
advisor-desc: Not quite sure what people mean when they say "agent"? This isn't a long page of reading — it's a little thing you play with, and it takes about two minutes. First you build a good "ask" one piece at a time, and you watch the answer change as you go. Then you put together a real little agent, and watch it grow up — from a careless guesser that just blurts something out, into a careful, reliable worker. You learn it by doing it, not by being told.

Not sure what people mean by an "agent"? This is a two-minute thing you play with, not a wall of text. You build a good "ask" piece by piece and watch the answer change; then you put together a real little agent and watch it go from a reckless guesser into a careful, reliable worker. You learn by doing.

Not sure what people mean by an "agent"? This is a two-minute explorable, not a wall of text. Build a good "ask" piece by piece and watch the answer change; then assemble a real little agent and watch it go from a reckless guesser to a careful, reliable worker. You learn by doing.

Unsure what an "agent" is? A two-minute explorable, not a wall of text. Build an "ask" piece by piece and watch the answer change; then assemble a real agent and watch it go from reckless guesser to careful, reliable worker. Learn by doing.
A two-minute explorable: build an "ask", then an agent — from reckless guesser to reliable worker. Learn by doing.
writers-what: A blank page with a whole writers' room sitting right beside it.
A blank page with a whole writers' room sitting beside it.
A blank page with a whole writers' room sitting beside it.
A blank page with a writers' room beside it.
A blank page plus a writers' room.
writers-desc: Write your story the way you would in any document. When you finish a paragraph, press Enter. A line-up of agents then reads it. They check the words, keep your genre and your voice, and remember your characters — so they can tell when one acts out of character. You decide whether to keep or change each suggestion. Nothing touches your words until you click.

Write your story like you would in any document. Finish a paragraph, press Enter, and a line-up of agents reads it — checking the words, keeping your genre and voice, and remembering your characters so they can tell when one acts out of character. You keep or change each suggestion; nothing touches your words without a click.

Write your story like you would in any document. You keep or change each suggestion; nothing touches your words without a click.

Write as in any document. Finish a paragraph, press Enter, and a line-up of agents checks the words, holds your genre and voice, and tracks your characters to catch out-of-character moments. Keep or change each suggestion; nothing changes without a click.
Write normally; press Enter and agents check wording, hold voice and genre, and flag out-of-character moments. Nothing changes without a click.

promise-intro: Whatever we make, we hold to the same simple ideas — the same ones we teach about.
Whatever we make, we hold to the same simple ideas — the same ones we teach about.
Whatever we make, we hold to the same simple ideas — the same ones we teach about.
Whatever we build, we hold to the same ideas we teach about.
promise-charge: You make the decisions, not the AI. We build everything here so the AI only suggests — you choose what to keep, what to change, and what to ignore, and nothing happens until you click. Don't take our word for it; watch where the control actually sits, and tell us if it ever slips.

You make the decisions, not the AI. We build these so the AI suggests and you choose what to keep, change, or ignore — nothing happens without your click. Don't take our word for it; watch where the control sits, and tell us if it slips.

You make the decisions, not the AI. We build these so the AI suggests; you choose what to keep, change, or ignore, and nothing happens without your click. See for yourself whether the control stays with you.
You make the decisions. The AI suggests; you keep, change, or ignore — nothing happens without your click. Check whether it holds.
You make the decisions. AI suggests; you choose; nothing happens without your click.
promise-privacy: Your information stays yours. We keep things on your own device wherever we can, and we would never quietly pass your details around.
Your information stays yours. We keep things on your own device wherever we can, and we'd never quietly hand your details around.

promise-nolockin: Nothing locks you in. If you ever want to walk away, you can — and your stuff comes with you.
Nothing locks you in. If you ever want to walk away, you can — your stuff comes with you.
